results.title: Dianthus Therapeutics to Participate in Two Investor Conferences
results.description: NEW YORK and WALTHAM, Mass., May 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Dianthus Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: DNTH), a clinical-stage biotechnology company dedicated to developing next-generation therapies to transform the treatment of severe autoimmune diseases, today announced the Company’s participation in two investor conferences in June 2026.
